suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require an explicit same-SHA remote check-run proof step (IDs/URLs for lint, vitest, pytest, playwright on the asserted revision) before marking final confidence-gate evidence complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix review for confidence-gates-evidence-immutable-proof-fix notes the previous miss originated from an underspecified evidence requirement in ci-gate-worker guidance and was corrected by explicit required-context cross-validation fields.
